faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Ocean Hill?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Ocean Hill typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants or regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than most common ants (up to 1/2 inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. Unlike termites, they don't eat wood but excavate it to build nests, leaving behind sawdust-like frass. You may also hear faint rustling sounds inside walls or see winged ants in spring, indicating an established colony.

faqs.question: How long does carpenter ant treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll typically see a significant reduction in carpenter ant activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination of the colony usually takes 7-14 days as worker ants carry treatment back to the nest. Follow-up visits may be scheduled to ensure the entire colony is destroyed and to address any satellite nests.

faqs.question: Can carpenter ants damage my Ocean Hill home?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants can cause significant structural damage over time by hollowing out wood to create their nests. They're especially attracted to moisture-damaged wood common in older Brooklyn buildings. Early detection and professional treatment are essential to prevent costly repairs to beams, joists, window frames, and other wooden structures in your Ocean Hill property.
